recommendations.title: Franco Escamilla: por la anécdota
recommendations.overview: Mexican stand-up comedian Franco Escamilla draws his jokes from real-life experiences -- and he's willing to do anything for new material. He's not afraid to make generalizations about how men bathe. But he is scared to talk to strangers. Especially

recommendations.title: Aziz Ansari: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: Standup comedian Aziz Ansari ("Parks and Recreation") headlines his third standup special, where he shares his uniquely hilarious perspective on fears of adulthood, babies, marriage, and more. Ansari's look at life on the cusp of 30 years old is smar

recommendations.title: Hasan Minhaj: Homecoming King
recommendations.overview: Comic Hasan Minhaj of "The Daily Show" shares personal stories about racism, immigrant parents, prom night horrors and more in this stand-up special.

recommendations.title: Annie Hall
recommendations.overview: New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditsy Annie Hall.

recommendations.title: Synonyms
recommendations.overview: A young Israeli man absconds to Paris to flee his nationality, aided by his trusty Franco-Israeli dictionary.

recommendations.title: Hannah Gadsby: Nanette
recommendations.overview: The Australian comedian Hannah Gadsby is taking an anti-comedy stance in her newest special.

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young transgender man explores his gender identity and searches for love in rural Nebraska.

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: C'era un cinese in coma
recommendations.overview: A talent agent with a truly talentless client roster, Ercole Preziosi finds himself in trouble when a car crash injures his star comedian, so he turns to his young plucky driver to do stand-up duty.

recommendations.title: Farewell My Concubine
recommendations.overview: In an epic tale of theater, gender, love and class, two Beijing opera actors navigate political turmoil as their friendship evolves over decades.
